error.description: Error occurred while updating push provider configurations.
Error occurred while deleting push provider configurations
Error occurred while updating default push sender configuration.

success.description: Default push sender configuration updated successfully.

revertConfig.heading: Delete Configurations
revertConfig.subHeading: This action will delete push provider configurations. Once deleted, users will not receive any push notifications.

description: Configure the push notification provider credentials to enable sending push notifications.
heading: Push Provider

deleteConfirmation.content: If you delete the push provider, users will no longer receive push notifications from applications set up with push authentication. Proceed with caution.
deleteConfirmation.heading: Are you sure?
deleteConfirmation.message: This action is irreversible and will permanently delete the current push provider configuration.

pushProviderSettings.defaultSenderDescription: Select this provider as the default push notification sender.

subHeading: Configure a push provider to send push notifications to your users.
